title: Automating & Standardizing Employee Onboarding @ Chat Based HR Company (Harmonize)

blocks.text: 📌 Project Overview

Harmonize HQ is a chat-based HR platform designed to create a fun and collaborative workplace by streamlining employee onboarding. Early-stage startups often struggle with standardized onboarding due to rapid team changes, evolving jo roles, and a lack of structured processes. To solve this, I led the development of an MVP onboarding automation tool, ensuring consistency, efficiency, and scalability for growing startups.
Problem (The Challenge)
💡 Startups struggle with scalable onboarding solutions
Rapid role & team changes make structured onboarding difficult.
Existing onboarding systems are rigid and not adaptable for startups.
Inefficient manual processes lead to missed steps and inconsistent experiences.
Solution & Execution (My Role & Impact)
As Lead Product Manager, I led 0→1 product development, cross-functional team hiring, and user research to develop an automated, standardized onboarding solution.
✅ Product Strategy & MVP Development:
Designed an automated onboarding tool with role-specific templates for flexibility.
Integrated an email scheduler for personalized communication, reducing manual effort.
Focused on driving product adoption across Harmonize's HR suite.
✅ User Research & Iteration:
Conducted 20+ usability interviews to refine product positioning based on real user pain points.
Iterated using data-driven design features that prioritized usability over "nice-to-haves".
✅ Business & Revenue Impact:
Developed a growth strategy to convert free users into paid product adoption.
Used scrappy experimentation to test and validate feature effectiveness before full rollout.
Results & Impact
📈 Product Adoption & Engagement:
Increased startup adoption of the MVP, driving broader HR suite engagement.
Boosted outreach response rates from 10% to 35% through refined product positioning.
💰 Revenue Growth & Efficiency Gains:
Increased monthly recurring revenue by 7% by driving free users to paid products.
Reduced onboarding time and improved completion rates for new hires.
📊 Key Metrics Measured:
Total # of candidates onboarded → Tracked user engagement & adoption.
% of onboarding completed → Measured process efficiency.
Time to onboarding completion → Reduced inefficiencies in workflow.
# of startups using Harmonize MVP & other products → Quantified product stickiness.
Key Learnings & Takeaways
🚀 0→1 Product Development: Drove MVP from concept to launch, requiring rapid iterations, experimentation, and cross-team alignment.
📊 Data-Driven Decision Making: Applied A/B testing, user feedback, and analytics to prioritize features that directly solved user pain points.
🤝 Process Standardization & Communication: Established Scrum methodologies, JIRA workflows, and Slack-based communication to keep teams aligned.
